race.comment: Could make a case for half a dozen of them. NEXT STEP IOWA (11) was returning from a break last time out and proved too classy, scoring by 2 lengths over 1100m at Pakenham. Tricky gate but is a second-up winner, unbeaten soft ground and can only be improved. Will give a sight again. MAUNA KEA MISS (10) is a talented local who strips fitter and is well-weighted with the claim. CONFLICT (3) has ability and senior rider goes on. Will be winding up late.  HARMONETT (4) is a local who put the writing on the wall last time and can feature in the finish again. Back from a let-up but has been kept ticking over with a trial and best form has been here at home.
